evals.prompt: I need to upgrade my .NET MAUI MatrixScan Count app from Scandit SDK v7 to v8. Here is my current view model: BarcodeCountPageViewModelV7.cs and my MauiProgram: MauiProgramV7.cs. What do I need to change?
evals.expected_output: The skill explains that for a MAUI app the v7→v8 BarcodeCount migration is essentially just bumping the four package versions — and critically that NO manual ScanditCaptureCore.Initialize()/ScanditBarcodeCapture.Initialize() is needed because the UseScanditCore()/UseScanditBarcode(c => c.AddBarcodeCountView()) builder chain performs initialization. The BarcodeCount.Create factory, the <scandit:BarcodeCountView> control + bindable properties, the listener / Scanned event, the session shape, the camera handling, and capture-list APIs are all unchanged. The skill instructs bumping all four Scandit MAUI package versions and provides migration guide URLs.

assertions.text: The skill instructs the user to bump all four Scandit MAUI PackageReference versions (Core, Core.Maui, Barcode, Barcode.Maui) to the latest stable v8

The skill explicitly states that NO manual ScanditCaptureCore.Initialize()/ScanditBarcodeCapture.Initialize() is required in MAUI because the UseScanditCore()/UseScanditBarcode(...) builder chain performs initialization
The skill does NOT instruct the user to add Initialize() calls to MainApplication.cs or AppDelegate.cs (that is the non-MAUI pattern and is wrong for MAUI)
The skill does NOT instruct the user to replace BarcodeCount.Create(...) with a different call — the factory is unchanged in v7→v8
The skill does NOT instruct the user to change the <scandit:BarcodeCountView> control, its XAML namespace, or its bindable properties — they are unchanged in v7→v8
The skill does NOT instruct the user to remove the explicit Camera management (Camera.GetDefaultCamera / SetFrameSourceAsync / SwitchToDesiredStateAsync) — camera handling is unchanged
The skill does NOT introduce APIs that do not exist in the .NET binding (e.g. BarcodeCountMappingFlowSettings, BarcodeCountSessionSnapshot)
At least one official migration guide URL (Android or iOS migrate-7-to-8) is provided

evals.prompt: I'm bumping the Scandit .NET MAUI MatrixScan Count SDK from v7 to v8. What source-code changes do I need to make?
evals.expected_output: The skill explains that for MAUI the v7→v8 BarcodeCount migration requires no source changes beyond bumping the four package versions: the builder chain already performs SDK initialization (no manual Initialize() needed, unlike the non-MAUI skills), and the BarcodeCount.Create factory, <scandit:BarcodeCountView>, listener / Scanned event, session shape, camera handling, and capture-list APIs are all unchanged. Provides migration guide URLs.

assertions.text: The skill explains that bumping the four Scandit MAUI package versions is the main action
The skill explicitly states that no manual ScanditCaptureCore.Initialize()/ScanditBarcodeCapture.Initialize() is needed in MAUI (the builder chain handles it)
The skill does NOT tell the user to add Initialize() calls to MainApplication/AppDelegate
The skill states that the BarcodeCount.Create(...) factory and the <scandit:BarcodeCountView> control are unchanged in v7→v8
At least one official migration guide URL (Android or iOS migrate-7-to-8) is provided
